message.distributionDefaultInviterIdTip.message: Default inviter's user ID. If the referral link has no inviter_id, this ID will be used.

message.distributionForceInviterIdTip.message: Forced inviter's user ID. If set, this ID is used regardless of inviter_id in the link.

message.originTip.message: Site domain. Bound to configuration and cannot be changed.

message.titleTip.message: Site title displayed in the browser tab.

message.descriptionTip.message: Site description for SEO and metadata.

message.logoTip.message: Site logo displayed at the top when menu expands.

message.faviconTip.message: Site favicon shown in the browser tab.

message.adminsTip.message: Site admin IDs. The creator is admin by default. Only admins can manage the site.

message.adminsTip2.message: Add or remove admin IDs here. Check user IDs at https://auth.acedata.cloud

message.keywordsTip.message: Site keywords, located in the site's metadata, used for SEO optimization.

message.keywordsTip2.message: Add or remove site keywords here. More precise keywords improve SEO.

message.featuresHeadshots.message: Enable or disable AI ID Photo module.

message.featuresI18n.message: Enable or disable multilingual support. If disabled, only the default language is available.
